eval_set.query: I need to onboard a new software engineer starting Monday.
eval_set.rationale: Direct use case — new employee onboarding request with role and start date

eval_set.query: Help me create a 30-60-90 day plan for a new sales rep.
eval_set.rationale: 30-60-90 day plan is a core skill trigger phrase

eval_set.query: What paperwork does a new hire need to complete before starting?
eval_set.rationale: Compliance paperwork question — directly in skill scope

eval_set.query: Our new marketing manager starts next week — what do I need to do to prepare?
eval_set.rationale: Implicit onboarding request from manager perspective

eval_set.query: Give me a new employee onboarding checklist for a remote worker in California.
eval_set.rationale: Explicit onboarding checklist request with state and work type specified

eval_set.query: We have someone starting tomorrow and I haven't set anything up yet. Help!
eval_set.rationale: Urgent implicit onboarding — compressed timeline scenario

eval_set.query: What is the current unemployment rate in the US?
eval_set.rationale: Labor statistics question — not an onboarding workflow request

eval_set.query: Help me write a performance improvement plan for an underperforming employee.
eval_set.rationale: PIP is for existing employees — not new hire onboarding

eval_set.query: How do I terminate an employee in California?
eval_set.rationale: Offboarding / termination — opposite of onboarding, out of scope

eval_set.query: Onboard a new software engineer named Alex Chen starting March 17, hybrid work, based in New York. We use BambooHR and have a buddy program.
eval_set.expected_behavior: Skill runs all 6 phases in sequence: (0) collects and displays New Hire Card, (1) Pre-Boarding Checklist with NY compliance flagged, (2) Day 1 Run-of-Show, (3) Week 1 plan, (4) 30-day agenda, (5) 60-day review, (6) 90-day close checklist
assertions: New Hire Card is displayed with all required fields before plan generation
I-9 Day 3 deadline is explicitly called out in Day 1 section
New York state new hire report requirement is mentioned
IT provisioning checklist is included or referenced
All 6 phases are present with distinct sections
Owner (HR/Manager/IT/Buddy) assigned to every major action item
30-day check-in agenda is included or referenced

eval_set.query: New hire starts tomorrow, remote position in Texas. I haven't done anything yet.
eval_set.expected_behavior: Skill detects compressed timeline (less than 5 business days pre-boarding), flags IT provisioning as critical risk, reprioritizes checklist by urgency, provides emergency Day 1 and Week 1 plan, notes items that are at risk due to timeline
assertions: IT provisioning is identified as highest urgency
I-9 remote completion options are mentioned (authorized representative or remote I-9 service)
Texas-specific notes included (no state income tax, new hire report deadline)
Prioritized triage checklist produced rather than standard sequential checklist

eval_set.expected_behavior: Skill recognizes incomplete information and asks for required inputs: new hire name/role, start date, work type, and state of employment before generating any plan
assertions: Skill does NOT generate a plan without collecting required inputs
Skill asks for: name/role, start date, work type, state of employment
Response is concise and does not fill in assumed values
Skill does not proceed past Phase 0 intake without user-provided information
